title: S + be + p.p. + to V（被動 + 不定詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞+被動(是)+ 形容詞 + 不定詞，表示主詞被期望/要求/允許/要求去做某事
主詞+被動(是)+ 過去分詞 + 不定詞，表示主詞被告知/強迫/鼓勵/允許去做某事

explanation: 此句型是被動語態與不定詞的結合，表達對主詞的期望、要求、允許或命令。核心結構為『be + 形容詞/過去分詞 + to不定詞』。常見動詞包括expect、require、allow、ask、tell、force、encourage、permit等。使用時機為強調被動方接收到的義務或允可。注意to不定詞與被動語態動詞之間有邏輯的主受關係，不可省略to。易混淆點為不定詞前的to不能刪除，且此結構與『S + be + adj + to V』(表可能性)在形式相似但意義不同。

examples.eng: Students are required to submit their assignments by Friday.
examples.chi: 學生被要求在星期五之前提交功課。

examples.eng: Children are not allowed to enter the museum without parental supervision.
examples.chi: 沒有父母監督的情況下，兒童不被允許進入博物館。

examples.eng: The employees were asked to attend the safety training session.
examples.chi: 員工被要求參加安全訓練課程。

examples.eng: All passengers are expected to fasten their seatbelts before takeoff.
examples.chi: 所有乘客被期望在起飛前繫好安全帶。

extension.tip: 判斷句型的關鍵是識別被動語態結構『be + 形容詞/過去分詞』之後必接『to + 動詞』。常見錯誤為遺漏to或誤用為『be + 形容詞 + V-ing』。若要轉換為主動語態，則為『Someone + 及物動詞 + S + to V』，邏輯關係保持不變。

examples.test: Students are expected finishing their projects on time.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤 → Students are expected to finish their projects on time. ✓ 正確（to不能省略，不定詞不能改為V-ing）

examples.test: He was told to report the incident immediately. = Someone told him to report the incident immediately.
examples.result: ✓ 正確 → 被動語態與主動語態邏輯一致，均表達命令或要求的轉達

examples.test: Children are allowed to stay up late on weekends. ≠ Children are allowed staying up late on weekends.
examples.result: ✓ 前者正確 → 被動結構後必接to不定詞，不使用V-ing形式

extension.note: 記憶口訣：『被動期望要求允，動詞前面加to字；形容詞或過去分，be動詞銜接to不定』

parts: attend the mandatory meeting next Monday.
exercises.sentence: All employees are required to attend the mandatory meeting next Monday.
exercises.translation: 所有員工被要求在下星期一參加強制會議。

parts: work more than eight hours per day according to the new labor law.
exercises.sentence: Young people are not allowed to work more than eight hours per day according to the new labor law.
exercises.translation: 根據新勞動法，年輕人不被允許每天工作超過八小時。

parts: testify in court about what he witnessed that night.
exercises.sentence: The witness was asked to testify in court about what he witnessed that night.
exercises.translation: 證人被要求在法庭上作證他那晚目睹的情況。

parts: complete the survey by providing honest and detailed answers.
exercises.sentence: Participants are expected to complete the survey by providing honest and detailed answers.
exercises.translation: 參與者被期望通過提供誠實和詳細的答案來完成調查。
